theory.intro: This test is used in conveying the secret message etc. In this test, messages are conveyed in coded words and later on they are to be decoded in order to get some meaning. The coded values are given according to some set pattern or principle. The patterns are of different types. It is the common sense of the students to know the pattern. Some patterns are given below:

sections.title: Coding patterns
paragraphs: Thus, coded word NPTDPX stands for MOSCOW.
In the above case, A stands for N, D stands for E, U stands for V. Thus, E C A D stands for
Thus, ECAD stands for L A T E or LANE as the appropriate case may be.
A D O L E S C E N T

examples.stem: If EFMIJ stands for DELHI and MPOEPO stands for LONDON, what does NPTDPX stand for?
examples.explanation: In the above example, each coded word stands for the previous word.

examples.stem: If ADVANCE in code form stands for NEUTRAL. What will ECAD stand for?
examples.explanation: Expressing the coded and decoded word as
